prestazioni: Engine swap to the **Nissan VR30DDTT** (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 400hp stock) from the Infiniti Q50 Red Sport 400, retaining the **MR20DD** (2.0L I4) block for weight distribution but upgrading internals with **JE forged pistons (2618 alloy, 9.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Tomei Type-S billet crankshaft**. Pair with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer)** and **HKS GT-SS intercooler (front-mount, 1000hp-capable)** for 550whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** managing **ID1000x injectors** and **Nissan Nismo GT-R ignition coils**.

Full **Nissan Nismo 400R-spec drivetrain upgrade**: **Nissan 400R 6-speed manual transmission** (adapted via **PPG quick-shift kit**) with **Nismo carbon fiber driveshaft**, **Cusco 2-way LSD (2.5-way preload adjustment)**, and **Nissan GT-R R35 rear differential (3.700 final drive)**. Clutch system uses a **Tilton 7.25" twin-disc ceramic clutch** with **Nissan Nismo flywheel (lightweight, 8.5kg)** for durability under boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (X-Trail GT-specific valving, 20-way compression/rebound damping)** paired with **Nissan Nismo front upper control arms (adjustable camber, -3.5°)** and **SPL Parts rear toe arms (adjustable, spherical bearings)**. Braking system features **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm two-piece rotors, slotted)** and **Brembo 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (X-Trail GT-specific, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares)** in **Nissan Racing Yellow (code: M3Y)**, paired with **Seibon carbon fiber hood (dual vented, 30% weight reduction)** and **Nismo S-Tune rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-piece)**. Front bumper replaced with **Tommy Kaira M20 aero bumper (DRL-integrated, 3D-printed ABS)** featuring **Morimoto XB LED fog lights (3000K, 30W)** and **custom aluminum mesh grille (black anodized, 5mm bar spacing)**.

Wheel setup: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x10 +15 front, 19x11 +20 rear)** in **Gunmetal with polished lip**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)**. Brake calipers painted **Brake Caliper Yellow (Duplicolor)** with **Nismo GT-R-style caliper covers (carbon fiber, laser-etched logos)**. Side mirrors replaced with **Nismo S-Tune carbon fiber mirrors (heated, auto-dimming)** and **custom aluminum side skirts (3D-printed, integrated LED turn signals)**.

Interior: **Recaro Sportster CS-II seats (X-Trail GT-specific bolsters, Alcantara/leather, yellow stitching)** with **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses (FIA-approved)**. Dashboard overlay in **Nismo S-Tune carbon fiber (gloss finish)** with **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS lap timer** and **Defi BF gauges (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, 52mm)**. Steering wheel swapped for **Nismo S-Tune flat-bottom wheel (suede, 350mm diameter)** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **custom leather shift knob (weighted, 150g, VR30DDTT engraved)**. Roll cage: **Custom 8-point chromoly cage (TIG-welded, gusseted, bolt-in)** by **AutoPower Industries** with **Nismo S-Tune door bars (carbon fiber covers)**.
